text: Relative to the SPY benchmark, BAC has delivered meaningful outperformance over the past year with a 23.37% return compared to the benchmark's 15.02%, representing 8.35% of excess return. However, recent momentum has weakened, with the stock underperforming by 2.54% over the past 30 days as BAC declined 1.40% while SPY gained 1.14%. This divergence suggests near-term headwinds despite the stronger long-term performance trajectory.
